items.title: Pakistan says it carried out ground operation, strikes along Afghan border; 29 militants killed
items.summary: Pakistani forces carried out “calibrated strikes” against terrorist hideouts and safe havens in the border region

items.summary: In a fourth day of hostilities, Iran said that it had targeted a U.S. naval base in Bahrain and a Kuwaiti air base with drones and missiles. No major damage or casualties were r...

items.title: Pope Leo prays for Venezuela’s recovery after deadly quakes
items.summary: Pope Leo expressed solidarity with Venezuelans after two deadly earthquakes claimed the lives of at least 1,400.
